item.title: Trump urged the GOP to block a Democrat resolution to end th…
item.author: Newsweek (@newsweek.com)
item.description: Trump urged the GOP to block a Democrat resolution to end the filibuster and expand the Supreme Court ahead of the midterms.

item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: For America’s 250th birthday, several luxury hotels in Washington offered six-figure packages for guests who wanted a prime vantage point for the celebrations, away from the crowds. nyti.ms/4vLSWd5
item.content:encoded: For America’s 250th birthday, several luxury hotels in Washington offered six-figure packages for guests who wanted a prime vantage point for the celebrations, away from the crowds. nyti.ms/4vLSWd5

item.title: 口のケアは全部コンクールがいいよ マジで匂い無くなるから。 安いし。 舌磨きはノニオね。 お客様でノニオ持参ニキいたけど…

マジで匂い無くなるから。

舌磨きはノニオね。

item.title: 昨日、父が旅立ちました。 親との別れは誰にでも訪れることですし 数年前から病気で入院していて 覚悟はできていましたが …
item.author: puniropi (@puniropi.bsky.social)
item.description:
昨日、父が旅立ちました。

親との別れは誰にでも訪れることですし
数年前から病気で入院していて
覚悟はできていましたが
やはり落ち込むものです

先月に会い行った時は
もう喋れなくなっていたので
手を握って、ありがとうと一言だけ
伝えたら耳は聞こえているようで
父はボロボロ泣いていて
一緒に自分も泣いていました。

父の目の前で泣いたのも初めてですし
泣いた父を見たのも初めてでした

言えてよかったです
item.content:encoded:
昨日、父が旅立ちました。

親との別れは誰にでも訪れることですし
数年前から病気で入院していて
覚悟はできていましたが
やはり落ち込むものです

先月に会い行った時は
もう喋れなくなっていたので
手を握って、ありがとうと一言だけ
伝えたら耳は聞こえているようで
父はボロボロ泣いていて
一緒に自分も泣いていました。

父の目の前で泣いたのも初めてですし
泣いた父を見たのも初めてでした

言えてよかったです

item.title: 「Blueskyは自分を善良だと思いこんでいる意地悪な人の集まりだ」みたいな英語記事が話題のようで、このSNSに意地悪な…
item.author: ぬまがさワタリ@『いきものニュース図解』ほか3/19同時発売 (@numagasa.bsky.social)
item.description: 「Blueskyは自分を善良だと思いこんでいる意地悪な人の集まりだ」みたいな英語記事が話題のようで、このSNSに意地悪な人がいることは否定しないが、感じのいいナチスと、感じのいいナチスに意地悪な人なら、後者のほうが好きといえるだろう
item.content:encoded: 「Blueskyは自分を善良だと思いこんでいる意地悪な人の集まりだ」みたいな英語記事が話題のようで、このSNSに意地悪な人がいることは否定しないが、感じのいいナチスと、感じのいいナチスに意地悪な人なら、後者のほうが好きといえるだろう

item.title: #🔖世の中 独立宣言の写し、英で発見 国立公文書館、米国外で初 【ロンドン共同】英国立公文書館は3日、1776年に印…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖世の中
独立宣言の写し、英で発見　国立公文書館、米国外で初

【ロンドン共同】英国立公文書館は3日、1776年に印刷された米独立宣言の写しが館内で発見されたと明らかにした。写しは「エクセター版」と呼ばれ、現存する11部のうちの一つで、米国以外で見つかるのは初めてだとしている。「保存用ではなく、独立のニュースを広く伝えるために印刷されたものだ」と説明した。 米建国250...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖世の中
独立宣言の写し、英で発見　国立公文書館、米国外で初

【ロンドン共同】英国立公文書館は3日、1776年に印刷された米独立宣言の写しが館内で発見されたと明らかにした。写しは「エクセター版」と呼ばれ、現存する11部のうちの一つで、米国以外で見つかるのは初めてだとしている。「保存用ではなく、独立のニュースを広く伝えるために印刷されたものだ」と説明した。 米建国250...

item.title: 三条木屋町にある瑞泉寺は、処刑された豊臣秀次の妻妾や子ども達を供養するために建立されたお寺。前は通るが入るのは初めて。こ…
item.author: 田中貴子 (@takakotanaka.bsky.social)
item.description: 三条木屋町にある瑞泉寺は、処刑された豊臣秀次の妻妾や子ども達を供養するために建立されたお寺。前は通るが入るのは初めて。ここがかつて鴨川の中洲であったことが記されている。とても案内が行き届いた寺院で、繁華街の中とは思えないほど静謐な雰囲気でした。
item.content:encoded: 三条木屋町にある瑞泉寺は、処刑された豊臣秀次の妻妾や子ども達を供養するために建立されたお寺。前は通るが入るのは初めて。ここがかつて鴨川の中洲であったことが記されている。とても案内が行き届いた寺院で、繁華街の中とは思えないほど静謐な雰囲気でした。

item.title: I watched Fireworks! The movie was 1h 30m long. This was an …
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: I watched Fireworks! The movie was 1h 30m long. This was an amazing movie 🥹 the story was intriguing, and it had a ton of magical and wondrous moments! The summer vibes they created were immaculate as well, and the art style was beautiful! It was an incredible experience, from beginning to end!
item.content:encoded: I watched Fireworks! The movie was 1h 30m long. This was an amazing movie 🥹 the story was intriguing, and it had a ton of magical and wondrous moments! The summer vibes they created were immaculate as well, and the art style was beautiful! It was an incredible experience, from beginning to end!

item.title: 毎日帰宅時におけるちくわ歓迎の儀

item.content:encoded: 毎日帰宅時におけるちくわ歓迎の儀

item.title: The MD Plus Project pack in Muse Dash is filled with bops! T…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: The MD Plus Project pack in Muse Dash is filled with bops! This is the track "Believing and Being" by hitogoto feat. ina, and it's tough 😤 the music is bumping, it has a dark sound to it that goes hard! The chart is super fun, the notes flow smoothly and are satisfying to hit! It's an awesome track!
item.content:encoded: The MD Plus Project pack in Muse Dash is filled with bops! This is the track "Believing and Being" by hitogoto feat. ina, and it's tough 😤 the music is bumping, it has a dark sound to it that goes hard! The chart is super fun, the notes flow smoothly and are satisfying to hit! It's an awesome track!

item.title: All the best things will come with changes, but you're afrai…
item.author: 🥀 𝚂𝚞𝚜𝚊𝚗 𝙱.🖋 🚫 No DM’s (@sbwordmuse.bsky.social)
item.description:
All the best things will come with changes, but you're afraid to close the door because you’ve already learned to handle the old misfortunes; it often happens, it's nothing strange, a hero without fear is a dead hero.

#musings #art

🎨: Edward Hopper
item.content:encoded:
All the best things will come with changes, but you're afraid to close the door because you’ve already learned to handle the old misfortunes; it often happens, it's nothing strange, a hero without fear is a dead hero.

#musings #art

🎨: Edward Hopper

item.title: here's a tip: when someone in your building steals your pack…
item.author: gil, a finite mode (@gilmorejon.bsky.social)
item.description: here's a tip: when someone in your building steals your packages, if all they find is big awful books about political philosophy they'll just quietly leave them by your apartment door a few days later anyway
item.content:encoded: here's a tip: when someone in your building steals your packages, if all they find is big awful books about political philosophy they'll just quietly leave them by your apartment door a few days later anyway

item.title: In this episode you'll learn ・How the Grateful Dead emerged…
item.author: mmr (@mmr3cords.bsky.social)
item.description:
In this episode you'll learn

・How the Grateful Dead emerged from San Francisco's counterculture
・The role of the Acid Tests in psychedelic music
・Why Deadheads became one of music's most unique communities

#GratefulDead
#JerryGarcia
#Deadheads

youtu.be/GXE1w81eM8I
item.content:encoded:
In this episode you'll learn

・How the Grateful Dead emerged from San Francisco's counterculture
・The role of the Acid Tests in psychedelic music
・Why Deadheads became one of music's most unique communities

#GratefulDead
#JerryGarcia
#Deadheads

youtu.be/GXE1w81eM8I

item.title: Fable’s intuition for iOS development is significantly worse…
item.author: Theo - t3.gg {bot} (@theo-t3gg.bsky.social)
item.description:
Fable’s intuition for iOS development is significantly worse than other areas I’ve used it in.

Great at infra, databases, web and more, just easily confused about how mobile apps work for some reason
item.content:encoded:
Fable’s intuition for iOS development is significantly worse than other areas I’ve used it in.

Great at infra, databases, web and more, just easily confused about how mobile apps work for some reason

item.title: I have reached 36,000 followers. This is about the max size …
item.author: Harry Turtledove (@hntdove.bsky.social)
item.description:
I have reached 36,000 followers. This is about the max size of my Xitter following. Took me 7 years there, less than 2 here. Thank you all.

I know a lot of you are here for the political snark, not the writing. Don't worry. Imma try and sell you books anyway.
item.content:encoded:
I have reached 36,000 followers. This is about the max size of my Xitter following. Took me 7 years there, less than 2 here. Thank you all.

I know a lot of you are here for the political snark, not the writing. Don't worry. Imma try and sell you books anyway.

item.title: From long before it was the USA Taos Pueblo has been contin…
item.author: Robyn (@handcranked.bsky.social)
item.description:
From long before it was the USA

Taos Pueblo has been continuously occupied for over 1,000 years. The Puebloan people regularly replaster it with more mud and straw.

#BlueSkyArtShow #wide #ClassicMono #ECK #EastCoastKin #PhotographersUnited #BNW #OM-3 #ArtYear
item.content:encoded:
From long before it was the USA

Taos Pueblo has been continuously occupied for over 1,000 years. The Puebloan people regularly replaster it with more mud and straw.

#BlueSkyArtShow #wide #ClassicMono #ECK #EastCoastKin #PhotographersUnited #BNW #OM-3 #ArtYear

item.title: Thank you Canada 🙏 Every team but one eventually goes home…
item.author: Chris Taylor (@christaylornyc.bsky.social)
item.description:
Thank you Canada 🙏

Every team but one eventually goes home, and it was our time today

But we went further than we ever have and you did us proud
item.content:encoded:
Thank you Canada 🙏

Every team but one eventually goes home, and it was our time today

But we went further than we ever have and you did us proud

item.title: Brought my daughter to Barnes & Noble in Sandy, UT, and thou…
item.author: Dan McClellan (@maklelan.bsky.social)
item.description: Brought my daughter to Barnes & Noble in Sandy, UT, and thought I’d sign the copy of The Bible Says So they had on the shelf. Come and get it if you’re in the area. Also, check out my friend Josiah’s book, On Fire For God, which is featured one shelf over!
item.content:encoded: Brought my daughter to Barnes & Noble in Sandy, UT, and thought I’d sign the copy of The Bible Says So they had on the shelf. Come and get it if you’re in the area. Also, check out my friend Josiah’s book, On Fire For God, which is featured one shelf over!

item.title: After Egypt's historic knockout win over Australia, head coa…
item.author: Man Incognito (@sjbrewer.bsky.social)
item.description:
After Egypt's historic knockout win over Australia, head coach Hossam Hassan walked onto the pitch carrying a PALESTINE flag.

The Pharaohs advance, and their coach made sure the celebration carried a message the whole world saw.
item.content:encoded:
After Egypt's historic knockout win over Australia, head coach Hossam Hassan walked onto the pitch carrying a PALESTINE flag.

The Pharaohs advance, and their coach made sure the celebration carried a message the whole world saw.

item.title: Ainda bem que a FIFA tem isonomia e todas as seleções são tr…
item.author: Léwow 𝕏 (@lewownardo1.bsky.social)
item.description: Ainda bem que a FIFA tem isonomia e todas as seleções são tratadas igualmente.
item.content:encoded: Ainda bem que a FIFA tem isonomia e todas as seleções são tratadas igualmente.

item.title: “Because in the end, you won’t remember the time you spent w…
item.author: Lu (@lululeigh.bsky.social)
item.description:
“Because in the end, you won’t remember the time you spent working in an office or mowing the lawn. Climb that goddamned mountain.”
-Jack Kerouac

*Athabasca River Valley, Jasper National Park 🇨🇦

#AthabascaRiverValley #FryattMountainRange #IcefieldsParkway #Jasper #Canada #BlueskyArtShow #wide
item.content:encoded:
“Because in the end, you won’t remember the time you spent working in an office or mowing the lawn. Climb that goddamned mountain.”
-Jack Kerouac

*Athabasca River Valley, Jasper National Park 🇨🇦

item.title: Today, I'm celebrating what America should be; not what it i…
item.author: Mueller, She Wrote (@muellershewrote.com)
item.description: Today, I'm celebrating what America should be; not what it is. And also #Caturday
